responsibilities: • analyze business models, organizational structure, and management processes   • identify operational inefficiencies and recommend improvement strategies   • support leadership in decision -making and change management   • conduct mar ket research, benchmarking, and performance analysis   • prepare business cases, reports, and presentations for senior management   • assist in transformation projects such as restructuring and turnaround   • coordinate with cross -functional teams and stakeholders
qualifications: • ca / mba / equivalent professional qualification   • strong analytical, problem -solving, and presentation skills   • experience in consulting or corporate strategy preferred
